title: Wire dashboard tabs to real API hooks

acceptance_criteria.then: it calls the real API hook from DASH-008, not a placeholder hook
real metrics are displayed in KPI cards and charts, not skeleton loading states

acceptance_criteria.given: the API is unreachable or returns an error
acceptance_criteria.then: an error state is shown with a message, not an infinite skeleton

acceptance_criteria.given: the user selects a different sprint from the sprint selector
acceptance_criteria.then: all tabs refresh and display data for the selected sprint
it displays velocity, cycle time, and throughput from useCurrentMetrics
it displays deployment frequency, lead time, change failure rate, and MTTR from useCurrentMetrics
it displays test coverage, mutation score, and security findings from useCurrentMetrics

acceptance_criteria.given: the Agent Efficiency tab is active
acceptance_criteria.then: it displays iterations per story, escalation rate, and phase durations from useCurrentMetrics
it displays stories completed, points delivered, and trend data from useTrends

acceptance_criteria.given: the Story Drill-down tab is active
acceptance_criteria.then: it displays the story list from useSprintDetail and allows clicking into a story for detail via useStoryDetail

non_functional_requirements.performance: Each tab renders within 200ms of data returning from the hook
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Loading and error states have appropriate aria-live announcements
non_functional_requirements.security: No API credentials or project IDs hardcoded in tab components

definition_of_done: All 6 tabs use real hooks from src/lib/hooks/ not placeholder hooks
All AC have passing unit tests
Error states render correctly when API returns error
Sprint selector change triggers data refresh on all tabs
